summary: Updated in-progress autosave review for the running short-tau/high-SNR r03 Ramsey diagnostic after the MAT reached 10 stored averages. The 10-average raw export has 900000 shots per tau point; the job remained healthy with monitor last_error empty and stop_requested=false. A later status snapshot had advanced to 11/12 averages with final-count text 35.122 kcps, still no monitor error or stop request. The early-time signal/ratio transient persists with median signal SEM about 1.06 kcps, and the exploratory ratio LS component remains near 1.187 MHz; this is nonterminal context only and no T2star/13C claim is supported before terminal raw export plus scan-order-aware drift.
